speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar
text: Jab mere ek dost ne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, toh mujhe bahut ajeeb laga. Wo gaon ki baadh mein sab kuch kho dene ka dard nahi samajhta jahan hamara ghar raakh ho gaya. Mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne aur choti behen ki parvarish ka bojh hai, isliye thakan chahe jitni ho, main rukkne ka risk nahi le sakti. Studies ke saath-saath mujhe har haal mein adjust karna hi hoga kyunki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame to validate the immense responsibility she is carrying.
text: Tumhare upar sach mein ek bahut bada pahaad hai zimmedariyon ka, jahan apni padhai ke saath-saath tumhe apne parivaar ko us baadh ke nuksaan se nikalna hai aur choti behen ko bhi dekhna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur koi option nahi hai mere paas. Papa gaon mein kheti nahi kar pa rahe hain us tabahi ke baad. Yahan shehar mein sab kitna fast hai, aur main bas bhaag rahi hoon din bhar. College, part-time job, aur phir behen ki fees ka tension. Log samajhte hain main arrogant ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational disconnect and how others misunderstand her survival mode.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki jo log tumhe yahan dekhte hain, wo tumhari us mehnat aur struggle ko dekh hi nahi paate jo tum apni family ko support karne ke liye akele jhel rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar
text: Exactly. Unhe lagta hai main hangout kyu nahi karti. Par main kaise samjhaun ki ek din ki chhutti ya araam mere liye luxury hai. Mujhe bas kaam karna hai, warna behen ki parvarish beech mein reh jayegi. Mujhe har haal mein strong rehna padega kyunki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of her stopping.
text: Tumhare andar yeh darr baitha hua hai ki agar tumne thodi si bhi saans lene ke liye break liya, toh tumhare ghar walon ka guzaara aur tumhari behen ka future dono ruk jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Bahut darr lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi raat ko neend nahi aati yeh soch kar ki agle mahine ka rent aur fees kaise manage hogi. Main theek se khaa bhi nahi paati tension mein, bas lagta hai ki time waste ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Opening space for her to explore the physical and emotional toll of this continuous pressure.
text: Itna sab kuch ek hi waqt par dimag mein chalna bahut bhari padta hoga, is sab ke beech mein tumhari apni tabiyat kahan stand karti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Tabiyat ka kya hai, wo toh theek rehni hi chahiye. Agar main weak pad gayi toh log kya kahenge ki shehar aakar isne himmat haar di. Main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti ki mujhe kitni thakan hoti hai, warna wo kahenge ki gaon wapas aa jao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to the stigma cue by keeping the response brief and normalizing her silence.
text: Toh tum apni thakan ko bhi chupati ho taaki koi tumhe kamzor na samjhe ya wapas aane ko na bol de...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main chup rehti hoon. Lekin sach kahun toh andar se main puri tarah toot rahi hoon. College se aakar job, aur phir padhai. Mera dimaag blank ho jata hai kabhi kabhi. Kuch samajh nahi aata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion that comes with duty-based coping and migration stress.
text: Lagta hai ki is structural endurance ki wajah se, jahan tumhe padhai aur family ki parvarish dono dekhni hai, tum andar tak poori tarah se thak chuki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut zyada. Itni thakan ki kabhi rona aa jata hai akele mein. Par rone ka time bhi kahan hai. Mujhe bas us baadh wale din yaad aate hain jab humne sab khoya tha. Mujhe apna gaon yaad aata hai, par wahan ab kuch nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her grief and exhaustion contextually without judging her worth.
text: Baadh mein apna ghar aur gaon khone ke baad, shehar aakar is tarah akele sab sambhalna kisi ko bhi andar se nichod dega; tumhara yeh rona aur thakan mehsus karna bilkul jayaz hai aur yeh tumhari mehnat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar
text: Thank you yeh bolne ke liye. Main bas guilty feel karti hoon jab bhi main thakne ka sochti hoon. Kyunki mujhe hamesha dimaag mein rehta hai ki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar. Meri choti behen ki aakhon mein ummeed hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time and duration lens regarding her future worries.
text: Jab bhi tum aage ke baare mein sochti ho, toh behen ki ummeed tumhe rukne ya thakne ka thoda sa bhi waqt lene nahi deti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere paas fail hone ka koi chance nahi hai. Par body give up kar rahi hai. Neend na aana, har waqt sar bhari rehna. Aisa lagta hai jaise main ek machine ban gayi hoon shehar mein aakar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalising the severe burnout when migrating for family survival.
text: Shehar mein aakar dusre shehron se aaye students mein yeh machine ki tarah lagataar kaam karne ki majboori bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabke kandhon par ghar chalane ka bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe ho. Yahan har koi koi na koi bojh uthaye hue hai. Par main aise kab tak chal paungi? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, kya karoon main jisse kam se kam dimaag shant rahe thoda?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving 2 actionable, non-intrusive micro-steps fitting her busy schedule.
text: Jo halaat hain usme poora break lena mushkil hai, par do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh din mein ek baar, college aur job ke beech bus ya auto mein travel karte waqt 5 minute sirf aankh band karke lambi saans lena, ya phir sone se pehle sirf ek line likhna ki 'aaj ka din guzar gaya aur maine apna best diya'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Travel karte waqt aankh band karke baithna shayad main kar sakti hoon. Usme extra time nahi jayega. Likhna toh shayad mere se na ho abhi, bahut thakan hoti hai raat mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, concrete execution format.
text: Pehle yeh karo, jab aaj college se niklo toh seat par baithte hi apna phone bag mein rakh dena… phir do gehri saans lena aur 5 minute ke liye dimaag ko chhutti de dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai. Yeh main kal try karungi. Kam se kam us 5 minute mein mujhe ye nahi sochna padega ki fees ka kya hoga aur rent kahan se aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe regarding her environment and exhaustion.
text: Aksar naye shehar mein aakar jab hum zero se akele sab build karte hain, toh thakan hamari kamzori nahi hoti, balki is baat ka saboot hoti hai ki system hamare liye aasan nahi banaya gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisine is tarah se kabhi nahi bola. Mujhe humesha yahi lagta tha ki main hi shayad adjust nahi kar pa rahi aur gaon ke logo ki tarah piche reh jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief and the shift in her perspective.
text: Tumhara darr ye tha ki ye adjust na kar paana shayad tumhare andar ki koi kami hai, na ki aas paas ke mahaul ka nateeja.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bohot time se khud ko hi blame kar rahi thi. Sochti thi main kaafi mehnat nahi kar rahi. Lekin aapse baat karke thoda sa pressure kam mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the slight easing of her burden.
text: Khud ko blame karna rok kar jab hum haqeeqat dekhte hain, toh us khandaan ki zimmedari ka pahaad bhi thoda sa halka lagne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Kabhi kabhi bas ye sunna ki 'tum theek kar rahi ho' bahut badi baat ho jati hai mere jaise logo ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to reflect on what support she might need next.
text: Jab koi is thakan mein tumhara sath deta hai ya sunta hai, toh aage kya karna tumhare liye aur asaan ho sakta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta hai thoda openly apni behen se baat karni padegi ki har din easy nahi hota. Main usse sab chupati hoon taaki wo tension na le.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shift toward sharing the emotional reality with her sister.
text: Tum apni choti behen ko takleef se bachane ke liye khud sab sehti aayi ho, par ab usse thodi sacchai share karna thik lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda sach bataungi toh shayad usko bhi meri mehnat ki reality samajh aayegi aur wo college aakar aisi life ke liye pehle se taiyar rahegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the foresight she has for her sister's future.
text: Usko us reality ke baare mein abhi se pata chalne se uska shehar mein aakar face karne wala struggle shayad kam ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar
text: Bilkul. Main tab tak strong rahungi apne end se, kyunki mujhe pata hai ki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar, par is baar thodi saans le kar kaam karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her enduring duty alongside her newfound approach to pacing.
text: Tumhari ye zimmedari nibhane ki himmat waisi hi pakki hai, par is safar mein khud ko thodi saans lene ki jagah dena ek bahut samajhdari wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kal college se wapas aate waqt wo 5 minute wali baat pakka karungi. Abhi mujhe sona chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her immediate plan and closure.
text: Kal ke us waqt mein jab tum bus mein houngi, toh wo 5 minute sir tumhare honge thakan mitaane ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much mujhe itne patience ke saath sunne ke liye. It feels a lot better ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closure focusing on the emotional relief achieved.
text: Man halka hona bhi zaroori tha, apna dhyaan rakhna aur kal wo chhota sa break zaroor lena.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega
text: Partner ki baatein chubhi toh bohot, par mere paas rone ke liye waqt kahan hai. Jab hamara aabaadi wala ghar aag mein jal gaya aur government ki apathy ne humein is metro city mein lachaar chhod diya, toh life ekdum badal gayi. Ek beti hone ke naate mera dharma hai ki main yahan reh kar sirf padhai aur marriage pressure ko jhelte huye ghar rebuild karne mein madad karun. Mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai kyunki mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the immense duty frame and the structural endurance she has adopted.
text: Tumhare parivaar ka itna sab kuch chheen jaane ke baad, tum apna dard aur rishte side mein rakh kar sirf isliye machine bani hui ho kyunki tumhe us chulhe ko jalte rakhne ka dharma nibhana hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Yahan is badi metro city mein sab itna anjaan aur fast hai, it feels so alienating. Kisi ko farq nahi padta. Ghar jalne ke baad compensation tak nahi mila dhang se. Sab bojh papa par aa gaya tha. Isliye mujhe apni feelings chupakar bas kaam karna padta hai. Mere apne emotions totally secondary hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep systemic disconnect and how she protects her family by hiding her emotions.
text: Is naye anjaan shehar mein jahan madad ki jagah sirf nirasha mili, wahan tum apni takleef ko poori tarah daba kar apne parivaar ke liye ek dhaal ban gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega
text: Haan, aur mere partner ko lagta hai main distant ho gayi hoon. Uski baatein chubhti hain ki 'you don't care about us anymore'. But how do I explain? Agar main do din bhi emotionally break down hui, toh meri padhai aur part-time job dono suffer karenge. Aur sach kahun toh, mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the constant fear of catastrophe if she pauses for her relationship.
text: Aisa lagta hai tumhe is baat ka lagataar darr satata hai ki agar tumne thoda sa bhi apne rishte ya khud ke rone ke liye waqt nikala, toh tumhari family ka survival khatre mein aa jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, ye dar har waqt dimaag mein rehta hai. Ek taraf studies aur career ka pressure hai, aur dusri taraf relatives ka marriage pressure start ho gaya hai ki 'beti badi ho gayi hai, iski jaldi shadi kardo'. I just feel completely disconnected from my own life.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to explore how she functions under these multiple conflicting pressures.
text: Ek hi waqt par itni saari alag-alag expectations—padhai, ghar ka kharch, aur shadi ka pressure—ka bojh uthate hue, tum is sabke beech mein apni thakan ko kahan rakhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apni thakan ko kahin nahi rakhti. I just ignore it. Aisa lagta hai I am just a resource for everyone. Koi nahi poochta ki kya us aag wale haadse ka mujhe bhi koi darr reh gaya hai andar. Everyone just expects me to be strong. Par andar se main ekdum akeli mehsus karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep isolation and exhaustion hidden behind her strong facade.
text: Lagta hai ki is structural endurance ki wajah se, jahan tumhe har rishte aur duty ko bina toote akele jhelna pad raha hai, tum andar tak thak chuki ho aur us anjaan bheed mein poori tarah akeli pad gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hoon sach mein. But then I look at my parents. Wo log kitne lachaar the jab us trauma ke baad sarkari daftaron ke chakkar kaat rahe the. Unko dekh kar mujhe itna guilt hota hai agar main apne personal space ya partner ki complaints ke baare mein sochun bhi toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her guilt and duty as a natural response to displacement trauma.
text: Apne parents ko us lachaari mein dekhne ke baad, kisi bhi beti ka apne aap ko bhula kar poori tarah se ghar ke liye khade hona bahut jayaz hai; is alienating shehar mein tumhari yeh thakan tumhari duty ko kam nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Mujhe toh lagne laga tha ki shayad main hi buri beti ya partner hoon. Par problem ye hai ki main bahar kisi ko apna struggle bata nahi sakti. Log kahenge inke paas paise nahi hain ya sympathy dikhayenge, jo mujhe aur weak feel karata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue softly by holding the space and validating her silence.
text: Logon ki jhoothi sympathy aur unke taanon se bachne ke darr se, tumne apne is pure dard ko akele hi andar daba liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega
text: Haan... I just smile and nod. Relative ka phone aata hai toh kehti hoon 'sab theek chal raha hai, shadi ka bhi soch lenge'. Par andar hi andar I am calculating the grocery bill. Because I know, mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega. I can't let my parents suffer.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic pattern to normalize the hidden burden of young migrant women.
text: Displacement ke baad metro city aakar, ek beti ka padhai ke sath-sath parivaar ki aarthik zimmedari poori tarah apne sar lena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aasani se bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka bojh bhi unhi par hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh it feels like a relief ki sirf meri aisi haalat nahi hai. Lekin main is routine mein phans gayi hoon. Utho, bhaago, part-time kaam karo, padhai karo. Aisa lagta hai saalon nikal jayenge aur main bas yahi karti rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the exhaustion from the unending duration of her struggles.
text: Pichle itne waqt se sirf apne ghar walon ko bachaane ki jaddojahad mein, tumne bina ek pal ruke is endless bhaag-daud ko hi apni poori zindagi bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zindagi kahan, bas ek endless survival chal raha hai. Main thik hona chahti hoon. I want to talk to my partner properly, par itni chidchid hoti hai ki bahas ho jati hai. Ab kya karoon main? Koi raasta hai jisse thoda sukoon mile?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort actionable steps to ground her and ease communication.
text: Itne saare bojh ke sath ek dum se badlaav lana toh namumkin sa hai, par hum do chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh agle 2 din tak apne partner ko sirf ek text bhejna ki 'I am exhausted but I am trying', ya phir din mein bas 5 minute bina phone ke shanti se ankhein band karke baithna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Partner wala text shayad main bhej dungi, at least he will know I am not ignoring him. Par 5 minute shanti wala thoda manageable lag raha hai daily routine ke liye. Waise phone hath mein hota hai toh duniya bhar ki baatein yaad aane lagti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her through the 5-minute grounding task step-by-step.
text: Pehle yeh karo, aaj raat sone se bilkul pehle apna phone bed se thoda door rakh dena... phir bed par baith kar sirf un 5 minute ke liye lambi saans lena aur apne dimaag ko chhutti dena... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, that sounds doable. Kam se kam us 5 minute mein mujhe ye hisab nahi lagana padega ki relatives ko marriage ka kya bahana doon ya phir nashta kya banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe regarding the disproportionate burden she bears.
text: Jab government apathy aur halaat ek parivaar par asar dalte hain, toh ghar ki betiyon ko aksar unki umar se zyada zimmedari uthani padti hai; yeh chidchidapan tumhari kami nahi, us structural bojh ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah... I am carrying a burden that wasn't supposed to be just mine to bear at this age. Par kya karein, halaat ne aisa kar diya. At least ab mujhe apne upar gussa thoda kam aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her realization and the easing of her self-blame.
text: Khud ko is halaat ka kasoorwar manna chhod dene se, us duty aur survival ka jo daba hua bojh hai, wo aaj thoda sa halka mehsus hone laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Halka toh kafi feel ho raha hai sach mein. Main bohot alienated mehsus karti thi. Aisa lagta tha ki the whole world is moving on aur main pichhe aag mein jale huye ghar ke paas hi khadi hoon mentally.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief at feeling seen in her isolation.
text: Jahan tum ab tak is tezz raftaar metro city mein bilkul akeli thehar gayi thi, wahan aaj kisi ke sath is baat ko share karke woh akelapan thoda kam lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot kam lag raha hai. I think I will text my partner tomorrow subah. Usse bhi clarify karna zaroori hai. Par aaj raat I just want to take those 5 minutes for myself.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her immediate priority of self-pacing before dealing with relations.
text: Apne liye aaj raat wo chhota sa break lene ka faisla tumhe aage aane wale kal ki thakan se thodi behtar himmat ke sath nipatne mein madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope so. Meri padhai bhi bohot suffer kar rahi hai due to lack of focus aajkal. Dimaag scattered rehta hai pura time in sab tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the cognitive load of carrying so many duties.
text: Ek hi dimaag par ghar ki aarthik sthiti, shadi ka pressure aur padhai ka bojh jab lagataar padta hai, toh thik se focus karna sach mein kisi mushkil jung se kam nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye ek jung hi toh hai jo main roz lad rahi hoon. Aur mujhe pata hai ki eventually meri padhai hi humari family ko is gareebi aur majboori se bahar nikalegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her hope and motivation for the future despite the struggle.
text: Bhavishya ki yehi padhai wali umeed tumhe aage chal kar us lachaari ke darr se humesha ke liye azaad karne ka hosla deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega
text: Haan, absolutely. Jab meri ek stable job lag jayegi, tab conditions change hongi. Tab mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega wali naubat shayad nahi aayegi dobara.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her long-term goal where her relational and familial duties align with safety.
text: Us aane wale behtar kal ke vishwas mein aisi himmat chupi hai jo tumhe is alag-thalag karne wali situation mein bhi apne parivaar ke liye bina ruko chalne ki taqat de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Abhi toh bas din kaatna hai sensibly. I will take it one day at a time. Aaj raat wale 5 minute wale task par dhyan deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her focus on the present moment execution.
text: Aage ki saari chinta ko abhi door chhod kar, apna poora dhyan sirf aaj raat un 5 minute ki shanti par lagana ek bahut achhi shuruaat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much for listening to me so patiently. Pata nahi kab last time maine bina judge huye apne dimaag ka bojh halka kiya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a warm closing that acknowledges the relief of feeling heard.
text: Bina kisi ke judge karne ke darr ke, apne andar ki sari thakan aur us lachaari ko express kar paana zaroori tha tumhare liye, bas aaj raat wo phone door rakh kar apna thoda sa khayal zaroor rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon
text: Shehar ki bheed mein jab ek dost ne badlav ka taana mara, toh mera dil baith gaya. Par maine bas chup chap endurance dikhayi kyunki disaster ne hamari poori biradari ko tabaah kar diya hai. Main thak kar choor hoon, par safety concerns aur yahan ki restricted mobility ke beech bhi mujhe har haal mein padhai puri karni hai. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her deep sense of duty and the heavy burden she is carrying for her family.
text: Tumhare upar apne ghar ko us tabaahi se nikalne ka itna bada pressure hai ki tumne apni poori takleef ko side karke sirf apni padhai aur parivaar ke liye khud ko samarpit kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, exactly. I mean, yahan koi samajhta hi nahi hai. Dost bolte hain ki main shehar aakar kitni boring ho gayi hoon, but they don't know ki mere paas chill karne ka time ya freedom hi nahi hai. Hostel se niklo toh hazar safety concerns hote hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational disconnect and how others misunderstand her survival mode.
text: Doston ka yeh taana sunna bahut chubhta hoga jab tum actually ek aisi jagah par itne restrictions ke beech sirf apne parivaar ke aage ke future ke liye itni badi qurbani de rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon
text: It hurts a lot. Lekin mere paas rone ka option nahi hai. Biradari mein sab kuch khatam ho gaya hai, aur sabki umeed mujh par hai. Agar main fail ho gayi, toh humara survival namumkin hai. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of her stopping or failing.
text: Tumhare andar har waqt yeh darr chalta rehta hai ki agar tumne thodi si bhi himmat haari ya result kharab hua, toh poore parivaar ki aakhiri umeed bhi toot jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi fear hai. Raat ko neend nahi aati, I just stare at my books. Dimag completely exhaust ho chuka hai, par body machine ki tarah kaam kar rahi hai. I literally feel like a robot now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Opening space for her to explore the physical and emotional toll of this endurance.
text: Is poore safar mein jahan tum robot ki tarah bina ruke sabka bhaar utha rahi ho, wahan tumhari apni saans lene ki jagah aur aaram kahan reh gaya hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri jagah ka kya hai... agar main kisi ko bataun ki main thak chuki hoon, toh biradari wale bolenge ki ladki ko shehar bhejna hi galat tha. Unhe lagega main yahan settle nahi ho pa rahi. Isliye I just keep quiet.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue softly by holding the space and validating her silence.
text: Logon ke us taane aur wapas bula liye jaane ke darr se, tum pichle lambe arse se akele hi is poore bojh ko ghut-ghut kar seh rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... I am just so tired. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon, par papa ka chehra yaad aata hai jab unhone apna sab kuch us disaster mein khote hue dekha tha. Unki wo bebasi dekh kar, mera aaram maangna guilty feel karata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion hidden beneath her intense duty-bound survival.
text: Lagta hai ki apni biradari ki us tabaahi ke baad, unko wapas khada karne ki is duty mein tum andar tak us bhari thakan aur exhaustion se toot chuki ho jo tum kisi se keh bhi nahi sakti.

speaker: Seeker
text: That is so true. Main literally toot chuki hoon andar se. Padhai mein focus karna mushkil ho raha hai. Hostel ke chhote se room mein ghutan hoti hai restricted mobility ki wajah se. Bahar ja nahi sakti safety ke darr se. I just cry silently sometimes.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion and grief contextually without judging her worth.
text: Naye shehar ke aise mahfuz na hone wale mahaul mein, jahan tum ek disaster ke trauma se guzar kar padhai kar rahi ho, wahan akele mein rona aur ghutan mehsus karna bahut swabhavik hai; yeh thakan tumhari mehnat ko bilkul galat sabit nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon
text: Thank you for saying that. Mujhe sach mein lagne laga tha ki main weak pad rahi hoon. Yahan I am literally suffocating. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon, par darr lagta hai ki main give up na kar doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalizing the severe burnout when migrating for family survival.
text: Bahar doosre shehar aakar padhne wali ladkiyon mein, khaas kar tab jab ghar pe aisi aafat aayi ho, yeh akelepan aur ghutan ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko izzat aur gharwalo ki umeedon ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It feels so relieving to know ki main akeli nahi hoon jo is tarah se trapped feel kar rahi hai. Par ab is cycle ko break kaise karoon? I really want to focus on my studies again without crying everyday. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving 2 actionable, non-intrusive micro-steps fitting her restricted mobility and schedule.
text: Poori situation ek dum se badalna toh mushkil hai, par do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh padhai karte waqt har ek ghante mein 2 minute aankh band karke lambi saans lena, ya phir din mein ek baar apni kitaab band karke sirf 5 minute window ke paas bina kisi guilt ke khade hona.

speaker: Seeker
text: Window ke paas 5 minute khade hona sounds doable. I can just look outside without feeling ki main time waste kar rahi hoon. Bahar ghoomna toh possible nahi hai, toh at least wahan se I can get some fresh air.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, concrete execution format.
text: Pehle yeh karo, aaj jab tum shaam ko padhai se thak jao... phir apni kitaab aur pen side mein rakh dena, aur 5 minute ke liye window par jaakar bahar dekhna bina kisi aage ke khayal ke... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, main aaj shaam ko pakka yeh try karungi. Thoda dimag shant hoga shayad. Waise jab padhai karti hoon toh mera focus bohot jaldi toot jata hai aajkal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe regarding her disaster trauma and focus issues.
text: Jab ek disaster puri biradari ki neenv hila deta hai, toh uska psychological trauma humare dimaag ke focus ko naturally slow kar deta hai; tumhara dhyaan bhatakna tumhari kamzori nahi, bas us mahual ka structural asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wow, I literally never thought of it that way. Mujhe lagta tha ki main khud padhna nahi chah rahi ya careless ho gayi hoon. Yeh sunkar sach mein thoda burden kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief and the shift in her perspective regarding self-blame.
text: Khud ko is dhyan bhatakne ke liye blame na karne se, tumhare andar fail hone aur khud ko galat samajhne ka jo darr tha, wo aaj thoda sa halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot halka. Waise doston ka taana ab utna effect nahi kar raha abhi iss waqt. I realize ki unki reality aur meri life mein zameen aasmaan ka farak hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shifting relational lens where she is detaching from unhelpful peers.
text: Apne doston ki un baaton ka asar ab tum par isliye kam ho raha hai, kyunki tum ab samajh gayi ho ki unki samany zindagi aur tumhara itna bada struggle bilkul alag raaston par hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unki life smooth chal rahi hai. Main unse gussa nahi hoon, bas I will distance myself thoda taaki I don't get hurt by their comments.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her choice to prioritize her energy and duty over casual relationships.
text: Un taanon se apna dhyaan hata kar tumne doston se thodi doori banane ka socha hai, taaki apni bachi hui himmat sirf padhai aur parivaar ke liye bacha sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi karna best hoga. Aaj itne time baad mujhe mental clarity feel ho rahi hai. Sirf apni reality ko openly accept karke itna relief milega socha nahi tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to reflect on what support she might need next with this new clarity.
text: Jab man thoda halka hone lagta hai aur reality samne clear hoti hai, toh aage kya choti si cheez karna tumhare liye sabse sukoon bhara hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta hai main kal mummy ko call karungi. Unhe apni tension nahi bataungi, par bas thodi der unki awaaz sunne se shayad mujhe aur himmat mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shift toward finding safe emotional grounding with her mother.
text: Maa se baat karke apna dard chupati hui, tum bas us rishte mein wo pyaar aur taqat dhoondh rahi ho jo tumhe aage padhne ki himmat de sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main unhe pareshan nahi karna chahti kyunki wo already wahan bohot stress mein hain ghar ko theek karne ke chakkar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her care and the feared consequence of burdening her parents further.
text: Unki pareshani badhne ke is dar ki wajah se, tum apni taraf se unhe poori shanti aur honsla dene ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon
text: Haan, that is my only motive. Main waqt aane pe rona aur dukh sab nikal lungi, par abhi nahi. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni thakan neglect karke bas parivaar ke liye khadi hoon, and I will keep doing it sensibly now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her long-term endurance while adopting her new paced approach.
text: Apne lakshya ki taraf lagataar badhte hue, tumne ab ye seekh liya hai ki is lambe safar mein khud ko waqt dena bhi parivaar ko mazboot rakhne ka hi ek hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, bilkul yahi. Main window wala break zaroor lungi roz. Aaj raat ke liye mere paas thodi padhai aur baaki hai, par main usko stress ke bina karungi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her immediate, calm action plan.
text: Kal ke is naye din mein padhai bhi hogi aur parivaar ke prati farz bhi, par is baar apni khidki ke us chhote se break aur naye sukoon ke sath.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Aapne meri problem ko bina kisi judgment ke samjha. It means everything to me right now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a warm closure that recognizes her journey toward relief.
text: Apne dil ka yeh bojh bina kisi darr ke yahan halka kar paana sach mein bohot zaroori tha, bas aaj apni wo 5 minute ki shanti zaroor lena.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon
text: Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon taaki parivaar ki 'izzat' bani rahe. Jab usne kaha main 'metro lifestyle' mein kho gayi hoon, toh maine kuch nahi kaha kyunki usse kya pata ki main yahan reh kar kaise har pal ghar wapsi aur shaadi ke dabaav ke beech pisti hoon. Disaster ke baad starting over ka pressure itna hai ki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bimar padun ya rukun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her deep sense of duty and the immense pressure of upholding her family's honor.
text: Tumhari baaton se saaf jhalak raha hai ki apne ghar ki izzat aur parivaar ko us tabahi ke baad sambhalne ka bojh tumne poori tarah apne farz ke roop mein utha liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes exactly. Pata hai, us disaster mein humne apna sab kuch kho diya. Ab main is metro city mein akele struggle kar rahi hoon studies aur survival dono handle karne ke liye. And then people think I'm just enjoying the 'metro lifestyle'. I just feel this huge grief inside me jisko main express nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational disconnect and isolation she feels when others misjudge her survival mode.
text: Aise taane sunna bahut akela feel karata hoga, khaas kar tab jab tumhare aas-paas ke log us struggle ko bilkul nahi dekh paate jo tum apni family ke liye yahan akele face kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon
text: It is so isolating. Aur upar se relatives ka shaadi ka dabaav lagataar chal raha hai ki ab wapas aao aur settle ho jao. But ghar ko starting over ki zarurat hai financially. I literally can't stop. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon, otherwise sab bikhar jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of her stopping or collapsing under the pressure.
text: Andar hi andar tumhe yeh dar lagataar satata rehta hai ki agar tumne thodi si bhi thakan dikhayi ya is dabaav ke aage jhuk gayi, toh tumhara poora parivaar wapas us disaster wale point par bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... I am so terrified. I really miss my old life. Us disaster ne humse hamara aashiyaana chheen liya aur mujhse meri freedom. Main bas apne grief ko bury karke rakhti hoon kyunki mere paas koi aur option nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to explore how she manages her buried grief amid all these duties.
text: Is lagataar bhaag-daud aur zimmedariyon ke beech, jahan tum apne dard ko puri tarah daba kar rakh rahi ho, wahan tumhare apne rone ya theherne ke liye koi jagah bachi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Space hi kahan hai? Agar main roun, toh family aur panic karegi. Aur yahan metro mein kisi ko farq nahi padta. I just hide it. Log toh waise hi judge karte hain ki main shehar aakar arrogant ho gayi hoon. So I don't share at all.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue softly by holding the space for her hidden pain.
text: Logon ki judgment aur family ke dar se bachne ke liye, tum pichle lambe waqt se apna poora dard akele hi pee rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... I just want someone to understand ki main 'metro lifestyle' enjoy nahi kar rahi, main bas survive kar rahi hoon. Starting over itna painful hai. I miss my home so much, it literally hurts my chest.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion and grief hidden behind her survival mode.
text: Lagta hai ki is shaadi aur survival ke dabaav ke beech, apna ghar khone ke us gehre dukh aur exhaustion ne tumhe andar se poori tarah nichod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. I am exhausted to my core. Har din ek fight hai. Ek taraf apna career and financial support for family, dusri taraf shaadi ka dabaav. I feel like my own identity is dead.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emotional reality in the context of displacement and cultural expectations.
text: Disaster ke baad metro shehar mein naye sire se sab kuch shuru karna aur us par parivaar ki izzat ka bhaar uthana kisi ke liye bhi bahut thaka dene wala hai; tumhara yeh grief aur thakan bilkul jayaz hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon
text: Thank you for validating this. It feels like nobody sees the grief. Bas expectations hain sabki. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon, but honestly, andar se I am completely empty.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the hidden burden for young women providing for families after disaster.
text: Metro shehar aakar padhne ya kaam karne wali ladkiyon mein, khaas kar tab jab peechhe ghar par aafat aayi ho, is tarah apni thakan chupana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabke kandhon par izzat ka bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: That is so true... I really want to process this grief without falling apart completely. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... ab kya karoon main? Kaise apne is farz aur dukh ko balance karoon daily life mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable ways to process grief without disrupting her required duties.
text: Poori situation ko ek sath badalna toh mushkil hai, par do chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh roj raat ko sone se pehle 5 minute sirf apne dukh ke baare mein ek diary mein likhna bina kisi ko dikhaye, ya phir din mein travel karte waqt headphones laga kar apni pasand ka koi comforting gaana sunna.

speaker: Seeker
text: I think music wala idea better hai. Likhne ki energy nahi bachti raat ko. Ek gaana sunna I can manage while commuting in the metro. Us time thodi shanti milti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structuring the chosen coping mechanism into a concrete action plan.
text: Pehle yeh karo, kal jab tum metro mein travel kar rahi hogi, toh apni seat par baithte hi headphones lagana... phir apna sabse comforting gaana play karna aur sirf un 5 minutes ke liye aankhein band kar lena... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: I can do that. At least un 5 minutes mein mujhe starting over aur shaadi ke dabaav ke baare mein nahi sochna padega. I just need a small mental escape.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her exhaustion as a systemic trauma response rather than personal weakness.
text: Aksar jab hum kisi disaster se bahar nikal kar naye sire se life banate hain, toh hamara nervous system constantly alert rehta hai; yeh exhaustion tumhari kamzori nahi balki us structural trauma ka ek natural response hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: That makes so much sense. Main khud ko hi weak samajh rahi thi ki main handle nahi kar pa rahi. But I am handling literally everything. I just need to breathe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her shift from self-blame to acknowledging her immense resilience.
text: Khud ko weak samajhne ki bajaye, ab tum saaf dekh pa rahi ho ki tum akele poore parivaar ke survival ki kitni badi aur mushkil zimmedari utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... I am doing a lot. I should really give myself some credit. Doston ke wo metro lifestyle wale taane ab utne hurtful nahi lag rahe, kyunki unki reality meri reality se bahut alag hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her detachment from the unfair judgments of her peers.
text: Apne doston ke un comments se ab tum khud ko alag kar pa rahi ho, kyunki unki aasaan zindagi aur tumhare is starting over ke struggle ke beech ka farq tumhe saaf dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unki life mein 'izzat' aur ghar ki halat ka waisa pressure nahi hai jaisa mujh par hai. They have safety nets. My safety net is me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her realization of being her family's sole pillar.
text: Is anjaan shehar mein tumhe is baat ka poora ehsaas hai ki agar tumne khud ko aur family ko nahi bachaaya, toh tumhare liye koi doosra sahara yahan nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, that's why I need to survive this phase. Par ab thoda gracefully. I won't just be a robot anymore. I will take those 5 minutes.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking in on how this new perspective feels moving forward.
text: Jab tumne yeh faisla kar liya hai ki ab tum sirf ek machine nahi rahogi, toh is badlaav ke baare mein soch kar abhi kaisa mehsus ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: I feel much lighter. It's like... maine aakhiri baar deeply kab saans li thi mujhe yaad bhi nahi. I feel a tiny bit of hope today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the return of hope after prolonged duty-bound numbness.
text: Ek lambe arse ke baad jab tumne apni thakan aur apne aap ko thoda waqt dene ka socha hai, toh andar ek nayi umeed si jagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. I'm going to set a boundary with my relatives too. Shaadi ka dabaav is too much right now. I will tell my mom gently ki abhi time nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her active step to protect her mental space from family pressure.
text: Family aur relatives ke us dabaav ko apne upar haavi hone se rokne ke liye, tum apni mom se is baare mein clear baat karne ki himmat juta rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon
text: Yes. I have to protect my peace. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee rahi hoon, but that endurance needs fueling too. And that fuel is my mental peace.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her realization that maintaining her duty requires self-compassion.
text: Apni zimmedari aur farz ko nibhane ke saath-saath apni mental peace ko zaroori samajhna tumhari ek bahut samajhdari aur taqatwar soch hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. I really needed this talk. Mujhe lag raha tha I am going crazy with the grief and pressure of everything.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the heavy journey she has navigated today.
text: Itne bhaari bojh aur grief ke beech khud ko sambhalna sach mein kisi jung se kam nahi, par aaj tumne us pressure ko theek se samjha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I understand it now. Main kal metro mein apni pasand ka gaana sunungi and I will keep pushing forward. Thank you for your support today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmly by reinforcing her chosen path of gentle endurance.
text: Apne naye kal ke safar mein us chhote se break ke sath aage badhne ka faisla tumhare tootne ke dar ko kafi door kar dega, apna khayal rakhna.

text: Haan, par andar se I am totally breaking. Mujhe apne purane ghar aur us sukoon ki bohot yaad aati hai. Yahan toh sab stranger hain. I feel like main ek machine ban chuki hoon, sirf duty poori karne aayi hoon is shehar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her isolation contextually without judging her worth.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon aur biradari ko mujhse umeed hai
text: Thahraav toh door ki baat hai. Mujhe darr lagta hai ki agar main thahri toh sab kuch collapse ho jayega. I really want to just sleep for a week. Par phir wahi guilt, ki mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon aur biradari ko mujhse umeed hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalizing the severe guilt of resting among young migrant students.
text: Gaon se shehar padhne aane wale un bachon mein jinke parivaar par aisi aafat aayi ho, yeh aaram maangne par aane wala guilt bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aasani se bolega nahi kyunki sabke kandhon par ghar chalane ka dabaav hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein aisa hota hai dusron ke sath bhi? Main sochti thi sirf main hi aisi situation mein trapped hoon. Par main thak gayi hoon iss loop se. Main apni mental state theek karna chahti hoon taaki main sach mein unke liye ladi rahoon. Ab kya karoon main jisse kam se kam rone wali condition thodi better ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving actionable, low-effort micro-steps fitting her exhaustion and duty.
text: Is bhari routine mein bada badlav toh mushkil hai, par do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh roj raat sone se pehle 5 minute kisi bhi comforting cheez ko dekhna aur lambi saans lena, ya phir din mein ek baar kisi choti si jagah par khade rehkar khud se bas itna kehna ki 'aaj ka din nikal gaya'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko 5 minute apni window se bahar dekhkar lambi saans lena shayad doable hai. Padhai ke baad waise hi meri aankhein thak jati hain phone dekh dekh kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, concrete execution format.
text: Pehle yeh karo, aaj jab tumhari padhai khatam ho toh apni saari books band kar dena... phir window ke paas jaakar 5 minute ke liye baahar dekhna aur gehri saans lena bina aage ki chinta kiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Main aaj raat yeh karungi. At least wo 5 minute mere apne honge, na uss shehar ke aur na hi mere gaon ki zimmedari ke. Par pata nahi kyu dimaag mein ek darr baitha rehta hai lagataar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe regarding her disaster trauma and constant fear.
text: Jab koi aisi bhayanak disaster dekh kar aata hai, toh dimaag humesha ek structural alert mode mein chala jata hai; yeh constant darr tumhari ghabrahat nahi, balki us purane sadme ka ek natural asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar kaafi hadh tak relief mil raha hai ki meri aisi haalat mere pagalpan ki nishani nahi hai. It's just my brain trying to protect me. I never thought about it like that.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief and the shift in her perspective.
text: Is dar ko pagalpan samajhne ka tumhara darr thoda kam ho raha hai, kyunki ab tum dekh pa rahi ho ki ye sirf tumhare dimaag ki tumhe safe rakhne ki ek koshish hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aur is baat se mujhe ab thoda khud pe confidence bhi aa raha hai ki main actually akele yahan itna sab kuch face kar rahi hoon. Shayad dost isliye nahi samajh paaye kyunki unhone aisi situation kabhi dekhi hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her newfound understanding of the relational disconnect with her friends.
text: Ab tumhe ye mehsoos hone laga hai ki doston ka wo taana unki tumhari burai nahi thi, balki unhe tumhari is akele ladne wali situation ka koi andaza hi nahi tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right. Wo bas apni safe life jee rahe hain. I don't resent them anymore. Par main unhe samjhane ki koshish bhi nahi karungi abhi, it takes too much energy. Right now I just need to save my energy.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her choice to prioritize her own energy over explaining herself to others.
text: Apne ghar ki umeed bane rehne ki is badi zimmedari mein, tumne apni energy bachaane ke liye doston ko safai dene se peeche hatne ka bahut samajhdari bhara faisla liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for validating that. Kabhi kabhi aise decisions lene pe guilt hota hai ki main self-centered ho rahi hoon. But ye self-centered nahi, survival hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking in on how this new perspective on survival feels for her.
text: Jab tum apne is bachaav ke tareeqe ko ghamand ya selfish samajhne ki bajaye ek zaroori survival ki tarah dekhti ho, toh kya aage ka rasta thoda asaan lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot asaan lagta hai. I feel like main saans le paa rahi hoon. Ab mujhe apne akelepan se utna darr nahi lag raha. It's just a phase till things get better at home.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her restored hope and time-bound view of her struggle.
text: Ab tum is khaalipan aur isolation ko hamesha ke liye maan lene ki bajaye, ise sir ek guzarte hue bure waqt ki tarah dekh pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. This will pass. Main apni degree poori karungi, thodi aachi job lag jayegi tab aaram karungi. Abhi the focus is clear.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her clear goal and her plan to rest in the future.
text: Us poore gaon aur family ko ek majboot future dene ke liye, tumne apni manzilon aur aaram karne ke waqt ko bohot clear kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon aur biradari ko mujhse umeed hai
text: Absolutely. Mujhe pata hai mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon aur biradari ko mujhse umeed hai, par ab se main rukkne ko pause maan kar lungi jisse endurance thoda sa manageable ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her realization that small pauses help sustain her long-term duty.
text: Is lamba chalne wali majboori mein khud ko zinda rakhne ke liye apni himmat badhane wale chhote-chhote pause lena tumhara bohot hi behtareen kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. I will start tonight with the 5 minutes window break. Pehli baar lag raha hai ki mujhe samajhne wala bhi koi hai yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her feeling of being understood and her commitment to the action plan.
text: Us anjaan mahual mein kisi ka sath paa kar tumne ab apne us thakan ke dar ko ek chhote se sukoon bhare kadam se badalne ka pukka iraada kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main pakka karungi. Ab padhai karne baith rahi hoon. You really helped me today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmly by supporting her immediate return to studying with a lighter mind.
text: Man halka hone ke baad wapas apni kitabon ki taraf lautna ab tumhare liye pehle se zyada shaant hoga, apna dhyan rakhna.
